# 2026-04-02 齐为 mock 协议号真实联调日志摘录

## 1. 说明

本文档用于固化 `2026-04-02` 基于齐为提供的 mock 协议号执行真实联调时，已经拿到的关键成功日志，避免仅依赖 `/tmp` 临时文件。

mock 协议号：

- `AIP211926033187CF73483`

## 2. 关键日志

以下为当次真实联调已拿到的关键输出摘录：

```text
abs.push.order_BEGIN ts=2026-04-02T16:06:02.650979+08:00 traceId=trace-qw-real-20260401-push-001 endpoint=https://t-api.test.qweimobile.com/api/abs/method partnerNo=abs partnerOrderNo=debug-ord-20260402-003 uniqueId=debug-user-20260402-003
abs.push.order_REQUEST_HEAD timestamp=1775117162599 sign=32202258e8559c5fad6bcb872cb5a664
abs.push.order_REQUEST_BODY {"requestHead":{"partnerNo":"abs","timestamp":1775117162599,"method":"abs.push.order","version":"v1.0","sign":"32202258e8559c5fad6bcb872cb5a664"},"requestBody":""}
abs.push.order_RESULT httpStatus=200
abs.push.order_RESPONSE_RAW {"code":530,"msg":"合作方订单号已经存在","data":null}
abs.token.get_BEGIN ts=2026-04-02T16:06:37.817158+08:00 traceId=trace-qw-real-20260401-token-002 endpoint=https://t-api.test.qweimobile.com/api/abs/method partnerNo=abs partnerOrderNo=debug-ord-20260402-003 uniqueId=debug-user-20260402-003
abs.token.get_REQUEST_HEAD timestamp=1775117197816 sign=b22f03e535d9a7962eb55a1410f8f6b0
abs.token.get_REQUEST_BODY {"requestHead":{"partnerNo":"abs","timestamp":1775117197816,"method":"abs.token.get","version":"v1.0","sign":"b22f03e535d9a7962eb55a1410f8f6b0"},"requestBody":"8f9eb018e8aa51fb551a5cdfdd3e903f56e49c5a519bf00ab5f2deffef336a1132fb2cc37233bcdfb0f943df5e0c5b1f662b8a998af2402be3dffe7212d8cbf46d7c86813f7ed6e8ac5e15948185d99462e1482ec6b7d36212846d253b182fa7"}
abs.token.get_RESULT httpStatus=200
abs.token.get_RESPONSE_RAW {"code":200,"msg":"OK","data":""}
QW_TOKEN_GET_RESPONSE_DECRYPTED {"cardCreatedDate":"2026-04-02 16:05:00","cardExpiryDate":"2026-05-02 23:59:59","memberFlag":0,"redirectUrl":"https://t-h5.test.qweimobile.com/#/?cardId=1327&token=9b0848b8-17b0-4fda-a713-86f98d9707c0","token":"9b0848b8-17b0-4fda-a713-86f98d9707c0"}
```

## 3. 解读

1. `abs.push.order` 返回 `530 合作方订单号已经存在`，说明同单已被齐为受理过
2. 紧接着 `abs.token.get` 返回 `200 / OK`
3. 解密后已拿到真实可用的：
   - `token`
   - `redirectUrl`
4. 这说明在 mock 协议号下，齐为会员卡已经进入可联登状态

## 4. 结论

本轮日志已经能够证明：

1. mock 协议号可以打通齐为扣款 / 生效链路
2. `515 会员卡未生效` 的原阻塞点已经被排除
3. 后续正式上线的关键工作，不再是继续猜测齐为参数，而是补通联真实协议号接入
